scope: F组第三轮赛后复盘红队校验；只审查事实链、赛前预测解释、竞彩口径、模型过拟合与成员表回填门禁
source_log: K:\worldcup\比赛\已完成比赛\小组赛\F组\F组第二轮复盘.md
notes: 赛果由任务指令给定：日本 1-1 瑞典；突尼斯 1-3 荷兰
本地当前未确认第三轮单场官方复盘文件，因此 player_state 只能部分安全回填

fact_conflict_check.item: Japan vs Sweden pre-match chain included 1-1 in top score outcomes
fact_conflict_check.note: Result does not contradict the pre-match probability surface.

fact_conflict_check.item: Sweden must win was simplified into automatic high-total script
fact_conflict_check.note: This is an over-attribution risk. The safer reading is that Sweden's urgency mainly enlarged late-game and set-piece tails.

fact_conflict_check.item: Netherlands strong win equals handicap cover certainty
fact_conflict_check.note: Actual 1-3 maps to Tunisia +2 let_draw, not a full strong-side handicap cash.

fact_conflict_check.item: Third-round motivation and qualification path were fully official-state verified pre-match
fact_conflict_check.note: Existing chain still carried heuristic path warnings; postmatch language cannot rewrite that into full closure.

market_checks.issue: Ordinary favorite price on Japan did not imply safe Japan -1 handicap support.
Ordinary SPF was unavailable pre-match, so market calibration was partial and cannot be rewritten as full market confirmation after the result.

model_overfit_flags: Do not convert the correct Netherlands win direction into a claim that margin or handicap logic was fully correct.
Do not convert the Japan draw result into proof that Sweden urgency automatically creates open games.
Do not backfill player ratings or player_state using scoreline alone.

player_state_writeback.reason: Third-round single-match official postmatch files and minute-level confirmation are not yet verified locally.

responsibility.issue: If postmatch copy sells directional success as precise payout or exact margin validation, that is model explanation overfit.
Publishing layer must distinguish scoreline hit, handicap result, and remaining data gaps.
Must not narrate Netherlands win as automatic +2 cover or ignore Japan -1 let_negative.
Need third-round single-match evidence before claiming complete player_state or member-table writeback.
Risk lies more in postmatch over-attribution than in the baseline tactical read.

must_fix_items.item: State explicitly that Japan 1-1 Sweden means Japan -1 ended as let_negative / 让负.
State explicitly that Tunisia 1-3 Netherlands means Tunisia +2 ended as let_draw / 让平, not strong-side handicap cash.
Remove any linear wording that Sweden must win therefore the game was naturally a high-total or wide-open script.
Remove any wording that Netherlands strong win therefore the market fully backed a clean cover story.
Keep player_state and member-table status at partial_safe_writeback until official postmatch or minute-level evidence is added.

recommended_statement: 本轮赛果与赛前主预测方向并非完全冲突，但盘口兑现与赛果兑现不是同一件事。日本 1-1 瑞典对应日本 -1 让负；突尼斯 1-3 荷兰对应突尼斯 +2 让平。赛后解释应避免把“必须赢”简化为自动大球，也避免把“强队赢球”简化为自动穿盘。第三轮成员表与 player_state 若缺少官方单场复盘和分钟级确认，只能部分回填，不能宣称完整闭环。
